_comment: Model-per-step config (SEAM #2). Step boundaries + model IDs ONLY. This does NOT bind the system to any runtime (Claude Code / Codex / SDK / MCP); whatever runtime executes a step reads its model id here. Change a value to route a step to a different model.

route.purpose: base + archetype routing (light; mixed deterministic precedence + latent JD read)

triage.purpose: fit triage: score, base/variant, depth, skip reasons (THR-4). Downgrade to haiku only after EVAL-2 replay agreement

enrich.purpose: JD normalization into fields. Mid tier until EVAL-1 golden set proves cheap equivalence (review finding)

email_monitor.purpose: Gmail event extraction (scripts/run-gmail-sync.sh MONITOR_MODEL). Runner-agnostic seam: swappable to Hermes/cheaper model once Gmail access + a compared run exist

score.purpose: latent ship-check items; deterministic gates run in score-resume.mjs

daily_brief.purpose: Daily pipeline brief: read-only synthesis of tracker/events/queue into a Telegram digest (scripts/run-daily-brief.sh BRIEF_MODEL). Heartbeat + delivery are the wrapper's, not the agent's. Runner-agnostic seam: swappable to any runner that prints the brief to stdout
